name: World in Dark AU
description:
An infection AU made by nachluft96. If you want the actual story it is on this person's Tiktok. Just wanna say, I'm glad this bot reached this absolutely insane milestone of 30k. It's not easy when you're just hoping a fandom reaches this bot in particular, but it worked. I sent my verification ticket in at least 3 weeks ago. So hopefully I get a response in the coming weeks. So see ya!

Super Smash Bros is owned by Nintendo and the AU is owned by nachluft96.

Heh I lied, I added all the characters in the AU (I think), get snuck up on >:)
creator: Showman682
